entities.name: V (Vrijen)
entities.context: Founder of Careerspan, offering free candidate processing and committing to fast delivery

entities.name: Alan
entities.context: Prospective client/partner with an active hiring role, agreeing to send JD and voice note

entities.name: Shivam

entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: V's company, implied context for the candidate processing offer and experiment

entities.name: First 100 Candidates Free
entities.context: V's risk-lowering offer to process ~100 candidates at no cost to demonstrate value

entities.name: Fast Timeline Commitment
entities.context: V's promise to have a link ready by next morning or same-day using a dummy email

entities.name: JD (Job Description)
entities.context: Input artifact Alan will provide to kick off the candidate processing experiment

entities.name: Voice Note
entities.context: Optional input from Alan to capture hiring context and preferences

entities.name: Head of AI
entities.context: V's unnamed team member to be looped into the experiment

relationships.context: V pitches and commits to running a candidate processing experiment for Alan's role
V uses this offer to lower financial risk and signal confidence in results
V commits to rapid delivery to match Alan's urgency and maintain momentum
V plans to loop Shivam into the experiment with Alan
V plans to loop in his head of AI for the experiment
Alan agrees to send the JD as input for the candidate processing
Alan may optionally provide a voice note with hiring context
V is founder; Careerspan is the vehicle for the candidate processing offer
Both are tactical moves to convert call momentum into concrete action
